chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. C.P No. D-599 of 2008 ____________________________________________________________ Dated Order with signature of Judge. ____________________________________________________________ Priority 1. For hearing of CMA No.2667/2008 2. For hearing of main case 03.02.2026. --------------- No one is in attendance on behalf of the Petitioner and no intimation has been received. The Petition stands dismissed for non- prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE TariqAli/PS
